await contract.logs(0)  // first entry
// View a specific log entry
await contract.isLogged("your-sha256-hash-here")
// Check if a specific URL hash is logged
await contract.getLogsCount()
// View total logs on-chain
const contract = ThreatLog.attach("0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3")
const ThreatLog = await ethers.getContractFactory("ThreatLog")
// Attach to your deployed contract
